details.quote: We and our third-party partners may use cookies, pixels, and similar technologies (collectively, “cookies”) on the Services for a number of purposes, including to conduct essential functions, collect statistical data, and integrate with third parties.
details.what_is_tracked: Utilisation des pixels pour des fonctions essentielles, la collecte de données statistiques et l'intégration avec des tiers.
details.vendor: Grindr LLC et ses partenaires tiers

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Privacy Policy (“Policy”) explains how Grindr LLC, its parent companies, and subsidiaries (such as Grindr Canada Inc.) (collectively “Grindr”) process your personal information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Controller:** Grindr LLC

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can also submit a request to contact Grindr's EEA/UK Data Protection Officer (DPO) through our website here

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: ● **Account Information:** When you set up an account, we require that you provide certain personal information such as email or phone number and date of birth to validate that you are an adult.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: |  |  |  |  |  | **Legal Basis** | Consent, Contract, Legitimate Interest, Legal Obligation |

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: When you set up an account, we **require** that you provide certain personal information such as email or phone number and date of birth to validate that you are an adult.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We retain your personal information for no longer than is necessary to fulfill the purposes for which the information was collected or as otherwise permitted or pursuant to legal obligations

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: ● **Service Providers and Third-Party Partners.** Grindr may share your personal information with service providers and third-party partners to provide you the Services

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Grindr does not use AI for decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects, like those related to employment, credit, or housing.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: At Grindr, we work hard to maintain the integrity, confidentiality, and availability of the Services and to protect your personal information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Grindr collects some personal information from other sources, such as through payment processors (where we receive Purchase Information and Account Information), other users of our Services

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Grindr collects some personal information from other sources, such as through payment processors (where we receive Purchase Information and Account Information), other users of our Services (where the information we receive depends on the nature of their request to us) and, authentication partners like Apple, Google and Meta

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Individuals in the EEA/UK/Switzerland also have the right to complain to a supervisory authority about our collection and use of your personal information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: ● **Correction.** You may request that we correct your personal information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: ● **Access & Portability.** You may request that we provide you with confirmation that we process your personal information, a machine-readable copy of your personal information

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: ● **Deletion.** You may request that we delete the personal information we have collected from or about you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: ● **Restrict Processing.** Under certain circumstances, you may request that we limit the way we process your personal information

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: ● **Access & Portability.** You may request that we provide you with confirmation that we process your personal information, a machine-readable copy of your personal information

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: ● **Object to Processing.** You may object to us processing your personal information

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Effective Date:** 2026年7月6日

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: ### We and our third-party partners may use cookies, pixels, and similar technologies (collectively, “cookies”) on the Services for a number of purposes

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: We and our partners also use cookies for certain advertising purposes, including collecting information about your use of other sites and services to provide advertising (either on or off the Services) about products and services tailored to your interests.

cookies.label: Durée de conservation des cookies
cookies.quote: Retention periods differ depending on criteria such as the sensitivity of the personal information, the duration of our relationship with you, or if retention is required for legal or security purposes.

cookies.label: Liste des partenaires à jour
cookies.quote: We and our third-party partners may use cookies

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: including to conduct essential functions, collect statistical data, and integrate with third parties.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
Distinction fonctionnels / publicitaires
cookies.quote: For EEA/EU/UK users, other than cookies and similar technologies that are strictly necessary to operate the Services, we will only use these technologies with your consent.

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: For EEA/EU/UK users, other than cookies and similar technologies that are strictly necessary to operate the Services, we will only use these technologies with your consent.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: **Grindr is a U.S.-based company with no EEA/EU/UK/Swiss establishments at this time.** When you use the Services, your personal information will be processed by Grindr and its service providers in countries outside the EEA, UK and Switzerland, including in the United States.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote: certain personal information such as email or phone number and date of birth to validate that you are an adult
identite.purpose: Validation de l'âge et création de compte

contact.purpose: Coordonnées pour la création de compte et communications

compte_auth.quote: password. If you are registering for an account through Facebook or Google log-in, those respective credentials will be required when utilizing those methods
compte_auth.purpose: Authentification et gestion du compte utilisateur

paiement.quote: financial account and payment details, billing address, subscription tier, and renewal date

localisation.quote: we may collect your location information, including your precise geolocation, for purposes like determining your distance from other users (“Distance Information”) and displaying your location on our maps features
localisation.purpose: Affichage de la distance entre utilisateurs et géolocalisation

appareil_technique.quote: hardware and software information like your device model, device IDs, browser type, advertising identifiers, and IP address

usage_comportement.quote: user activity and how you interact with the Services, as well as hardware and software information like your device model, device IDs, browser type, advertising identifiers, and IP address
usage_comportement.purpose: Analyse du comportement utilisateur et amélioration des services

contenus_utilisateur.quote: photos, videos, and audio. Consistent with your permissions and if you enable video or photo features, we may collect audio, visual, or similar information
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Gestion des contenus multimédias partagés par l'utilisateur

communications.quote: Messages. You also have a choice about what personal information you provide when you send a message to other users of the Services (which could include content such as photos, location, audio, video, emojis, gifs, reactions, etc.)
communications.purpose: Échanges entre utilisateurs et support client

donnees_tiers.quote: Grindr collects some personal information from other sources, such as through payment processors (where we receive Purchase Information and Account Information), other users of our Services (where the information we receive depends on the nature of their request to us) and, authentication partners like Apple, Google and Meta (such as if you link your Instagram account to your Grindr profile)
donnees_tiers.purpose: Données reçues via des tiers pour l'authentification et les paiements

biometrie.quote: In certain jurisdictions, we may require you to provide a video selfie or pair a video selfie with an official photo ID to confirm you are 18 years of age or older. This will involve processing your biometric information

donnees_sensibles.quote: profile fields such as ethnicity, looking for and position) may be considered “sensitive”, “special category” under applicable privacy laws. We use this information to provide the Services as described in this Policy
donnees_sensibles.purpose: Gestion des données sensibles comme l'origine ethnique ou la santé

mineurs.quote: The Grindr properties are only for adults at least eighteen (18) years of age

legal_bases.quote: Where applicable, you can withdraw your consent for certain AI-related uses of your sensitive data by going to your in-app Settings and then tapping Privacy Settings

In certain jurisdictions, we may require you to provide a video selfie or pair a video selfie with an official photo ID to confirm you are 18 years of age or older. This will involve processing your biometric information

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, compte_auth, paiement, localisation, appareil_technique, usage_comportement, contenus_utilisateur, communications
legal_bases.quote: We use your personal information to provide and support features of the Services and support platform safety
Collecting statistical information about the use of the Services and properties ● Identifying, blocking, and/or removing illicit content or activity through AI algorithms
Comply with our legal obligations (as defined below)
For EEA/EU/UK users, other than cookies and similar technologies that are strictly necessary to operate the Services, we will only use these technologies with your consent

transfers.quote: Grindr is a U.S.-based company with no EEA/EU/UK/Swiss establishments at this time. When you use the Services, your personal information will be processed by Grindr and its service providers in countries outside the EEA, UK and Switzerland, including in the United States
